productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Blue & Black Check Shirt
description: Style Note casual shirts from adidas take style and comfort to an all new level. Paired with chinos, this check shirt is a must have in your evening wear wardrobe. You can also pair it with jeans for a casual look on your day off. Product Details Blue, grey and white check shirt with yellow and purple accents, has a spread collar, full buttoned placket, back yoke, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, mid arm buttoned tab to wear it with shorter fold over sleeves, patch pocket on the chest on the left side and a curved hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm Do not bleach or tumble dry Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
